Describe the sequence of events involving the kitchen equipment and food preparation shown in the video.
canonical_answer: At 4s, red curtains open to reveal silver roller grills; at 6s, a static display shows two grill models side-by-side; at 8s, a man plugs a black cord into a wall outlet; at 10s, the man transfers hot dogs from plastic packaging into a silver tray.

question: Describe the activities and setting changes during the outdoor gathering segment.
canonical_answer: At 16s, five people sit around an outdoor table with a blue checkered cloth; at 17s, plates with sausages and salad are visible on the table; at 18s, the scene shifts to show children wearing conical party hats; at 19s, blue and yellow balloons appear behind the group.
